title: terraform-observability-pack
pitch: Generate opinionated CloudWatch/Prometheus/Grafana monitoring modules from Terraform tags and outputs.
keyFeatures: Parse Terraform plan/state to discover resources and labels
Emit ready-to-apply CloudWatch alarms and dashboard JSON
Generate Prometheus scrape configs and Grafana dashboard templates
targetUsers: Platform/DevOps engineers who want standardized monitoring dashboards and alerts from Terraform-managed AWS/Kubernetes infrastructure.
